# Correct: use composition and dependency injection to mix and match optional behaviors dynamically at runtime
class Notifier:
    def __init__(self, transport, encryptor=None, compressor=None):
        self.transport = transport
        self.encryptor = encryptor
        self.compressor = compressor
        
    def notify(self, msg):
        if self.compressor: msg = self.compressor.compress(msg)
        if self.encryptor: msg = self.encryptor.encrypt(msg)
        self.transport.send(msg)
